_doc: OPERATOR presentation overlay. The emitter merges the machine engine (content+routing) with this overlay → engine.json (terminals schema). Bee-D never sets tier/severity. Dishes take heading from the menu label + result_copy from the grounded result_state unless overridden. Escapes REQUIRE heading+result_copy here. tier=67 FORCED on escapes. SEED map = PROPOSAL for operator approval at the diff HOLD.
_seed_map_proposal: Fresh 9-dish map (post-6c50d24 GATES_PASSED). dasp-unclaimed-super-transfer priced 147 here to satisfy the walk trio's red→$147 slot; the $67 alternative + the amber-vs-red severity (graph-corrections standing ruling said amber) are BOTH flagged in the diff-HOLD report for operator decision.

dasp-prepare-not-submit._seed_from: in-scope-pending: still in Australia — prepare, cannot submit yet

dasp-tax-rate-whm._seed_from: WHM 65% both elements; entire-payment (walk trio a: red→$67)

dasp-unclaimed-super-transfer._seed_from: 6-month ATO transfer; tier $147 + severity AMBER (graph-corrections standing ruling: money not lost, route changes). Walk trio b pays here (147, amber).

dasp-id-high-balance._seed_from: $5,000+ — Certification of Immigration Status may be required

dasp-id-standard._seed_from: below $5,000 — standard ID; no extra Certification

none_fit.heading: DASP may not apply to your situation
none_fit.result_copy: Your answers suggest DASP may not fit — for example you are an Australian or New Zealand citizen or permanent resident, or you held an excluded visa subclass (405 or 410), so the ordinary Australian super rules apply instead. If you are a former temporary resident who has since returned as a permanent resident and your fund transferred your super to the ATO as 'former temporary resident — unclaimed super', a DASP may still be payable — a short personalised review works through what applies to your circumstances and the steps to take next.

insufficient_information.heading: Your situation needs a closer look
insufficient_information.result_copy: Your answers do not yet confirm which DASP position applies to you — a key detail (such as your visa type, how long since you left, or your balance) is unconfirmed. A short personalised review confirms where you stand and exactly what to check before you claim.
